"'''Ord Vaxal: Prison Planet of the Empire'''" is an article in ''[[Polyhedron 165]]''. It was written by [[Gary Astleford]] and illustrated by [[James Ryman]] and [[Tommy Lee Edwards]]. Cartography was by [[Jeffery Carlisle]] and [[Kyle Stanley Hunter|Kyle Hunter]].
